headline: Eli Lilly (LLY) To Share New Kisunla And Alzheimer’s Blood Test Data At AAIC
summary: Eli Lilly plans to present new Alzheimer's research at the 2026 Alzheimer's Association International Conference, including long term data on Kisunla (donanemab-azbt). The company will share updated safety and biomarker findings from its Kisunla program. Eli Lilly will also outline progress on blood based P-tau217 diagnostics that could support broader Alzheimer's screening. Eli Lilly, traded as NYSE:LLY, is set to bring fresh Alzheimer's data to the forefront, while attention has recently...
